activities.observation: Tick and flea treatment products for farm dogs observed following online delivery. Veterinary supplies prepared for animal health management.
Two product sizes of tick and flea treatment observed, prepared for dogs of different body weight categories.
Twenty boxes of tick and flea treatment observed following online purchase. Total recorded purchase cost was 745 THB.
Multiple ticks observed attached to the body of a farm dog during routine health inspection prior to treatment.
A young farm dog observed sleeping indoors during routine animal monitoring. Tick treatment products remained nearby before scheduled veterinary care.
